questions.question: What is the main difference between a new thread created with the 'extends Thread' approach and the 'implements Runnable' approach in Java?
questions.hint: Consider the advantages and disadvantages of each approach

questions.question: What is the role of the 'Thread.start()' method in relation to the 'Thread.run()' method?
questions.hint: Understand the lifecycle of a thread in Java

questions.question: Explain the difference between 'synchronized' and 'volatile' keywords in Java, particularly in the context of multithreading.
questions.hint: Discuss their implications for thread safety and visibility
